scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-payout-dev-env.cjs && concurrently -n client,server,payout -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w payout-service"
scripts.dev:game: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm test -w payment-intent-service && npm test -w payout-service && npm test -w server
